requirement_topic.en: Connector Redesign — IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口重新設計——IEC 62196 Type 2 及 CCS2

summary.en: North Macedonia EV charging deployment follows European IEC interoperability practice for most public and semi-public charging: IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS Combo 2 for DC where the charging model and vehicle fleet specify it. Connector selection is a technical interoperability and procurement requirement, not standalone legal market approval.
summary.zh: 北马其顿公共和半公共充电部署通常遵循欧洲IEC互通做法：交流充电采用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在车型和车队要求时采用CCS Combo 2。接口选择是技术互操作和采购要求，并非单独的法律上市批准。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓公共與半公共充電部署通常遵循歐洲 IEC 互通慣例：交流充電採用 IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在車型與車隊要求時採用 CCS Combo 2。接口選擇是技術互通與採購要求，非單獨法律上市批准。

standards_or_laws: Project, fleet, operator, or public-procurement connector requirements

summary.en: China typically uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC connection devices, GB/T 20234.3 for DC interfaces, and GB/T 27930 for DC charger-to-BMS communication. Those materials should not be treated as Type 2 or CCS2 readiness without hardware, cable, pilot signal, locking, PLC/CAN, labeling, and safety re-evaluation.
summary.zh: 中国通常按GB/T 20234.2进行交流连接装置标准、GB/T 20234.3进行直流接口标准，并用GB/T 27930处理直流充电机与BMS通信。未完成硬件、线缆、接近/锁止、导引、PLC/CAN通信、标签与安全复评，不应将其直接称为Type 2或CCS2兼容。
summary.zht: 中國通常按 GB/T 20234.2 做交流連接裝置標準、GB/T 20234.3 做直流接口標準，並用 GB/T 27930 處理直流充電機與 BMS 通訊。若未完成硬體、電纜、接近/鎖止、導引、PLC/CAN 通訊、標籤與安全複評，不能直接視為 Type 2 或 CCS2 就緒。

gap.en: GB/T-only chargers need a hardware and protocol conversion plan for North Macedonia-facing projects: Type 2 or CCS2 couplers, cable thermal rating, lock and proximity circuits, control-pilot behaviour, DC PLC communication where CCS2 is used, charger labels, spare-part list, and retesting after connector redesign.
gap.zh: 仅按GB/T设计的充电桩进入北马其顿项目时，需要硬件和协议转换计划：Type 2或CCS2耦合器、电缆热额定、锁止与接近电路、控制导引行为、使用CCS2时的直流PLC通信、充电桩标签、备件清单及接口重设计后复测。
gap.zht: 僅按 GB/T 設計的充電樁進入北馬其頓項目時，需要硬體與通訊轉換方案：Type 2 或 CCS2 耦合器、電纜熱額定、鎖止與接近電路、控制導引行為、使用 CCS2 時的直流 PLC 通訊、充電樁標籤、備品清單及接口重設計後復測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where intended North Macedonia deployment, procurement document, charging network, or vehicle fleet specifies Type 2 / CCS2; otherwise market interoperability expectation rather than standalone approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity is a China-market connector baseline and is not a substitute for Type 2 or CCS2 compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not describe a GB/T 20234 connector package as Type 2 or CCS2 ready. Connector hardware, communications, labels, and safety evidence should be rebuilt around the specified IEC interface for the intended North Macedonia deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 20234接口包描述为已适配北马其顿Type 2或CCS2。应围绕目标部署指定的IEC接口重建接口硬件、通信、标签和安全证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將 GB/T 20234 接口包描述為已適配北馬其頓 Type 2 或 CCS2。應依目標部署指定的 IEC 接口重建接口硬體、通信、標籤與安全證據。
